title: Creator OS Notion Bundle – Business, Content, Finance, Launch, Product System
description: This is the Creator OS Notion bundle. Running a creator business means managing more than just content. It means tracking deals, handling launches, managing products, and actually knowing where your money is. Most creators juggle all of this across a dozen different tools and still feel like things are slipping through the cracks. Creator OS is built to fix that. This bundle includes all five templates in the Creator OS ecosystem - each one purpose-built for a specific part of your business, and designed to work together as a single connected system. What's included: Creator Finance OS - The complete money system for creators. Track every dollar coming in and going out. Revenue, expenses, monthly budget, savings goals, debt payoff, and tax estimator - built to give you a clear picture of your business finances every single month. Creator Content OS - Your full content library in Notion. Track everything you've published across every platform and format. Monitor performance, stay organized, and never lose track of what you've made or where it lives. Creator Business OS - The business pipeline for your creator brand. Manage contacts, brand deals, sponsorship conversations, client projects, deliverables, and follow-ups. The full CRM system built specifically for how creators work. Creator Launch OS - The execution layer for every launch you run. Plan campaign phases, organize launch tasks and assets, coordinate collaborators, track readiness, and review outcomes - all in one place, from idea through wrap-up. Creator Product OS - The complete inventory and operations system for your digital products. Manage product listings, files, bundles, version history, platform distribution, and customer support issues - everything that happens after you create something. How the ecosystem fits together: Each template solves a distinct problem. None of them overlap. Together they cover the full operating stack of a creator business: You create content and track it in Content OS. You manage the business opportunities that content generates in Business OS. You plan and execute launches in Launch OS. You manage your digital products and catalog in Product OS. And every dollar flows through Finance OS. This is the system for creators who are done piecing things together and ready to run their business with real infrastructure. What you get: - Five complete Notion templates with sample data pre-loaded - Clear setup instructions built into every template - Lifetime access with all future updates included - Compatible with Notion Free and paid plans

title: Creator Product OS - Notion Template | Digital Inventory, Files, Listings & Version Tracker for Creators
description: The Creator Product OS is the inventory and maintenance system your catalog has been missing. If you sell digital products - templates, printables, courses, toolkits, ebooks - you already know how quickly things get scattered. Files in one folder, listings across three platforms, version history in your head, and no easy way to check whether everything is current and connected. What it does: This Notion template gives you a single system to track every product you sell, every file attached to it, every platform listing, every version update, and every issue that needs fixing. When something falls out of date, you see it. When a file is missing, you see it. When a listing needs attention, you see it. Nothing slips through the cracks. What's inside: - Products - your master catalog of everything you sell or are building - Product Files & Assets - mockups, links, guides, ZIPs, and delivery assets connected to each product - Listings & Platforms - where each product is sold and the status of every listing - Bundles - grouped product offers with included items - Version Log - a running history of updates, patches, and changes - Support & Issues - bugs, broken links, missing files, and feature requests How it works: Every database connects back to your products. Add a product, attach its files, link its listings, and the system keeps everything visible and maintainable. A built-in flag system automatically surfaces products with missing files or open issues so you always know what needs your attention first. The homepage gives you a real-time snapshot of your entire catalog - active products, drafts in progress, items needing attention, and recent version updates - without opening a single database. Who this is for: Creators who sell digital products across multiple platforms and want one clean system to manage everything. If you have more than a handful of products and you've ever lost track of which version is live, which listing needs updating, or which file is missing - this is the fix. What you get: - One complete Notion template with six connected databases - Sample data pre-loaded so you can explore the system before adding your own - A guided Start Here page with setup instructions and workflow recommendations - Lifetime access with all future updates - Compatible with Notion Free and paid plans Stop managing your product catalog from memory. Start managing it from a system.
